summary: A 2019 DHS '#WhyISeeSay / Protect Your Every Day' PSA (same series as the bus/ballpark spots): ordinary people speak to camera about what is worth protecting (family, community), with on-screen 'WHY' text and a closing 'If you see something, say something' card. It is a narrated testimonial awareness spot, not a music-driven spectacle or genre experiment, and predates the second Trump administration. Out of scope.
notable_text: WHY / We all have something worth protecting, a why that unifies us. / Report suspicious activity to local authorities. If you see something, say something.
